'''Nooni Dalvo''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who worked as the navigator aboard the [[Liberator (Liberator-class)|''Trader's Luck'']], serving under its [[Captain/Legends|captain]], [[Garris Shrike]]. She was friends with [[Brafid]] and often walked about the vessel armed with a scaled-down [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] pistol.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}}
